relationship.title: Build a relationship with an MCA villager (gift items)

companion.title: Recruit an MCA villager as a companion

subtitle.text: The culture age does not make you powerful. It makes you known.

description: MCA Reborn villagers have a full relationship system.
Gift items to raise reputation. Talk regularly.
When reputation is high enough: recruit as companion.
Companions follow, fight, trade, and remember.
Marry to produce children who grow into villagers.
Rose Gold is an MCA Reborn material — used in
relationship items and high-tier MCA recipes.
The culture age does not make you powerful.
It makes you informed. And it makes you remembered.
→ Build a relationship with a villager [check]
